'''wachaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pocketknife|pocketknife]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pocketknife|pocketknife]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wachaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæchæzæth|wæchæzæth]] || [[word:wæchæzæj|wæchæzæj]] || [[word:wæchæzæsh|wæchæzæsh]] || [[word:wæchæzæ|wæchæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachachazath|wachachazath]] || [[word:wachachazaj|wachachazaj]] || [[word:wachachazash|wachachazash]] || [[word:wachachaza|wachachaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachazath|wachazath]] || [[word:wachazaj|wachazaj]] || [[word:wachazash|wachazash]] || [[word:wachaza|wachaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachafzath|wachafzath]] || [[word:wachafzaj|wachafzaj]] || [[word:wachafzash|wachafzash]] || [[word:wachafzaf|wachafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wachazatha|wachazatha]] || [[word:wachazaja|wachazaja]] || [[word:wachazasha|wachazasha]] || [[word:wachazaka|wachazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wachazath|wachazath]] || [[word:wachazaj|wachazaj]] || [[word:wachazash|wachazash]] || [[word:wachaza|wachaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wachazathal|wachazathal]] || [[word:wachazajal|wachazajal]] || [[word:wachazashal|wachazashal]] || [[word:wachazakal|wachazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wachazathatha|wachazathatha]] || [[word:wachazajaja|wachazajaja]] || [[word:wachazashasha|wachazashasha]] || [[word:wachazaka|wachazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wachazathan|wachazathan]] || [[word:wachazajan|wachazajan]] || [[word:wachazashan|wachazashan]] || [[word:wachazakan|wachazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wachazathaoro|wachazathaoro]] || [[word:wachazajaoro|wachazajaoro]] || [[word:wachazashaoro|wachazashaoro]] || [[word:wachazakaoro|wachazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
